properties.query:
union isfuzzy=true SailPointIDN_Events_CL, SailPointIDN_EventsV2_CL
| extend
    Id = column_ifexists('Id', column_ifexists('id_s', tostring(column_ifexists('id_g', '')))),
    Name = column_ifexists('Name', column_ifexists('name_s', '')),
    Created = column_ifexists('Created', column_ifexists('created_t', datetime(null))),
    Action = column_ifexists('Action', column_ifexists('action_s', '')),
    EventType = column_ifexists('EventType', column_ifexists('type_s', '')),
    TechnicalName = column_ifexists('TechnicalName', column_ifexists('technicalName_s', '')),
    Operation = column_ifexists('Operation', column_ifexists('operation_s', '')),
    Status = column_ifexists('Status', column_ifexists('status_s', '')),
    ActorName = column_ifexists('ActorName', column_ifexists('actor_name_s', '')),
    TargetName = column_ifexists('TargetName', column_ifexists('target_name_s', '')),
    Org = column_ifexists('Org', column_ifexists('org_s', '')),
    Pod = column_ifexists('Pod', column_ifexists('pod_s', '')),
    Stack = column_ifexists('Stack', column_ifexists('stack_s', '')),
    TrackingNumber = column_ifexists('TrackingNumber', tostring(column_ifexists('trackingNumber_g', ''))),
    Synced = column_ifexists('Synced', column_ifexists('synced_t', datetime(null))),
    Index = column_ifexists('Index', column_ifexists('_index_s', '')),
    DocType = column_ifexists('DocType', column_ifexists('_type_s', '')),
    Objects = column_ifexists('Objects', column_ifexists('objects_s', '')),
    Details = column_ifexists('Details', tostring(column_ifexists('details_g', ''))),
    AttributesOperation = column_ifexists('AttributesOperation', column_ifexists('attributes_operation_s', '')),
    AttributesProcessId = column_ifexists('AttributesProcessId', tostring(column_ifexists('attributes_processId_g', ''))),
    AttributesDuration = column_ifexists('AttributesDuration', column_ifexists('attributes_duration_s', '')),
    AttributesIdentitiesProcessed = column_ifexists('AttributesIdentitiesProcessed', column_ifexists('attributes_identitiesProcessed_s', '')),
    AttributesIdentitiesTotal = column_ifexists('AttributesIdentitiesTotal', column_ifexists('attributes_identitiesTotal_s', '')),
    AttributesIdentitiesSelected = column_ifexists('AttributesIdentitiesSelected', column_ifexists('attributes_identitiesSelected_s', '')),
    AttributesGroupsDeltaTokenBefore = column_ifexists('AttributesGroupsDeltaTokenBefore', column_ifexists('attributes_groupsDeltaToken_before_s', '')),
    AttributesGroupsDeltaTokenAfter = column_ifexists('AttributesGroupsDeltaTokenAfter', column_ifexists('attributes_groupsDeltaToken_after_s', '')),
    AttributesUserDeltaTokenBefore = column_ifexists('AttributesUserDeltaTokenBefore', column_ifexists('attributes_userDeltaToken_before_s', '')),
    AttributesUserDeltaTokenAfter = column_ifexists('AttributesUserDeltaTokenAfter', column_ifexists('attributes_userDeltaToken_after_s', '')),
    AttributesDirectoryRolesDeltaTokenBefore = column_ifexists('AttributesDirectoryRolesDeltaTokenBefore', column_ifexists('attributes_directoryRolesDeltaToken_before_s', '')),
    AttributesDirectoryRolesDeltaTokenAfter = column_ifexists('AttributesDirectoryRolesDeltaTokenAfter', column_ifexists('attributes_directoryRolesDeltaToken_after_s', '')),
    AttributesHostName = column_ifexists('AttributesHostName', column_ifexists('attributes_hostName_s', '')),
    AttributesUserId = column_ifexists('AttributesUserId', column_ifexists('attributes_userId_s', '')),
    AttributesScope = column_ifexists('AttributesScope', column_ifexists('attributes_scope_s', '')),
    AttributesSourceId = column_ifexists('AttributesSourceId', tostring(column_ifexists('attributes_sourceId_g', ''))),
    AttributesSourceName = column_ifexists('AttributesSourceName', column_ifexists('attributes_sourceName_s', '')),
    AttributesAggregationId = column_ifexists('AttributesAggregationId', tostring(column_ifexists('attributes_aggregationId_g', ''))),
    AttributesCapability = column_ifexists('AttributesCapability', column_ifexists('attributes_capability_s', ''))
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Id,
    Name,
    Created,
    Action,
    EventType,
    TechnicalName,
    Operation,
    Status,
    ActorName,
    TargetName,
    Org,
    Pod,
    Stack,
    TrackingNumber,
    Synced,
    Index,
    DocType,
    Objects,
    Details,
    AttributesOperation,
    AttributesProcessId,
    AttributesDuration,
    AttributesIdentitiesProcessed,
    AttributesIdentitiesTotal,
    AttributesIdentitiesSelected,
    AttributesGroupsDeltaTokenBefore,
    AttributesGroupsDeltaTokenAfter,
    AttributesUserDeltaTokenBefore,
    AttributesUserDeltaTokenAfter,
    AttributesDirectoryRolesDeltaTokenBefore,
    AttributesDirectoryRolesDeltaTokenAfter,
    AttributesHostName,
    AttributesUserId,
    AttributesScope,
    AttributesSourceId,
    AttributesSourceName,
    AttributesAggregationId,
    AttributesCapability,
    SourceSystem
